description: Creating pLDDT confidence profile visualization for DNAJC28 with J-domain secondary structure annotations
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
import requests

# Get AlphaFold pLDDT for the full protein
pdb_url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-Q9NX36-F1-model_v6.pdb"
pdb_text = requests.get(pdb_url).text

# Parse CA B-factors (pLDDT)
residues = []
plddts = []
for line in pdb_text.split('\n'):
    if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
        res_num = int(line[22:26].strip())
        bfactor = float(line[60:66])
        residues.append(res_num)
        plddts.append(bfactor)

residues = np.array(residues)
plddts = np.array(plddts)

# Create figure with two panels
fig, (ax1, ax2) = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(14, 10))

# Panel 1: Full protein pLDDT profile
ax1.plot(residues, plddts, 'b-', linewidth=1.5, alpha=0.8)
ax1.axhline(y=90, color='green', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Very high (>90)')
ax1.axhline(y=70, color='orange', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Confident (>70)')
ax1.axhline(y=50, color='red', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Low (>50)')

# Highlight J-domain
ax1.axvspan(51, 115, alpha=0.2, color='green', label='J-domain (51-115)')
ax1.axvspan(79, 81, alpha=0.4, color='red', label='HPD motif (79-81)')

ax1.set_xlabel('Residue Number', fontsize=12)
ax1.set_ylabel('pLDDT Score', fontsize=12)
ax1.set_title('DNAJC28 (Q9NX36) AlphaFold pLDDT Confidence Profile', fontsize=14)
ax1.legend(loc='lower right', fontsize=9)
ax1.set_xlim(1, 388)
ax1.set_ylim(20, 100)

# Panel 2: J-domain detail with secondary structure annotation
jd_mask = (residues >= 40) & (residues <= 125)
jd_res = residues[jd_mask]
jd_plddt = plddts[jd_mask]

ax2.bar(jd_res, jd_plddt, width=0.8, color='steelblue', alpha=0.7)

# Annotate helices
helix_regions = [(45, 54, 'Helix I', 'lightblue'), 
                 (63, 76, 'Helix II', 'cornflowerblue'), 
                 (88, 115, 'Helix III/IV', 'royalblue')]
for start, end, name, color in helix_regions:
    ax2.axvspan(start, end, alpha=0.2, color=color)
    ax2.text((start+end)/2, 98, name, ha='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

# Annotate HPD
ax2.axvspan(79, 81, alpha=0.3, color='red')
ax2.annotate('HPD', xy=(80, plddts[residues==80][0]), xytext=(80, 100),
            ha='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='red',
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red'))

# Annotate loops
ax2.text(58, 45, 'Loop\nI-II', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='gray')
ax2.text(83, 45, 'HPD\nLoop', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='gray')

ax2.axhline(y=90, color='green', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5)
ax2.axhline(y=70, color='orange', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5)
ax2.set_xlabel('Residue Number', fontsize=12)
ax2.set_ylabel('pLDDT Score', fontsize=12)
ax2.set_title('DNAJC28 J-domain Region: Secondary Structure & Confidence', fontsize=14)
ax2.set_xlim(40, 125)
ax2.set_ylim(40, 105)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('dnajc28_plddt_profile.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
print("Plot saved: dnajc28_plddt_profile.png")
